TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Haley Joel Osment (miyata April 10, 1988) a mu American a mu gaga. A mu nu a ru nu kising a mu nu asu a nu mu a nu amu, a nu Osment a mu role a mu nu comedy-drama film a Forrest Gump (1994) a mu ru a nu Young Artist Award. A mu nu a ru nu breakthrough a mu a nu psychological thriller film a The Sixth Sense (1999) a mu a nu Saturn Award a mu a ru a nu nominations a mu a nu Academy Award, a mu a nu Golden Globe Award a mu a nu Screen Actors Guild Award. A mu ru a nu success a mu a nu drama film a Pay It Forward (2000), a mu a nu science fiction film a A.I. Artificial Intelligence (2001) a mu a nu ru a nu Saturn Award a mu a nu comedy film a Secondhand Lions (2003) a mu a nu Critics Choice Award, a mu a nu animated film a The Jungle Book 2 (2003). A mu nu a ru a nu Sora a mu nu Kingdom Hearts video game franchise a mu a nu 2002, a mu a nu Vanitas a mu a nu same franchise a mu a nu 2010 a mu a nu 2020.
S.PHON: ha…≠…ôj *u…ô…≠ usm…ônt (mijata apri…≠ **, ****) a mu am…ôri ¶an a mu gaga. a mu nu a ru nu kisi≈ã a mu nu asu a nu mu a nu amu, a nu usm…ônt a mu ru…≠…ô a mu nu ¶um…ôdj-…ñama *i…≠m a *urr…ôst gump (****) a mu ru a nu juu≈ã artist award. a mu nu a ru nu br…ôakthruugh a mu a nu psj ¶hu…≠ugi ¶a…≠ thri…≠…≠…ôr *i…≠m a th…ô si*th s…ôns…ô (****) a mu a nu saturn award a mu a ru a nu numinatiuns a mu a nu a ¶ad…ômj award, a mu a nu gu…≠d…ôn g…≠ub…ô award a mu a nu s ¶r…ô…ôn a ¶turs gui…≠d award. a mu ru a nu su ¶ ¶…ôss a mu a nu …ñama *i…≠m a paj it *urward (****), a mu a nu s ¶i…ôn ¶…ô *i ¶tiun *i…≠m a a.i. arti*i ¶ia…≠ int…ô…≠…≠ig…ôn ¶…ô (****) a mu a nu ru a nu saturn award a mu a nu ¶um…ôdj *i…≠m a s…ô ¶undhand …≠iuns (****) a mu a nu ¶riti ¶s ¶hui ¶…ô award, a mu a nu animat…ôd *i…≠m a th…ô *u≈ã…≠…ô buuk * (****). a mu nu a ru a nu sura a mu nu ki≈ãdum h…ôarts vid…ôu gam…ô *ran ¶his…ô a mu a nu ****, a mu a nu vanitas a mu a nu sam…ô *ran ¶his…ô a mu a nu **** a mu a nu ****.
S.FORM: Haley Joel Osment (miyata April 10, 1988) a mu American a mu gaga. A mu nu a ru nu kising a mu nu asu a nu mu a nu amu, a nu Osment a mu role a mu nu comedy-drama film a Forrest Gump (1994) a mu ru a nu Young Artist Award. A mu nu a ru nu breakthrough a mu a nu psychological thriller film a The Sixth Sense (1999) a mu a nu Saturn Award a mu a ru a nu nominations a mu a nu Academy Award, a mu a nu Golden Globe Award a mu a nu Screen Actors Guild Award. Artificial Intelligence (2001) a mu a nu ru a nu Saturn Award a mu a nu comedy film a Secondhand Lions (2003) a mu a nu Critics Choice Award, a mu a nu animated film a The Jungle Book 2 (2003). A mu nu a ru a nu Sora a mu nu Kingdom Hearts video game franchise a mu a nu 2002, a mu a nu Vanitas a mu a nu same franchise a mu a nu 2010 a mu a nu 2020.
